creator: wes@barely3am.com
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/libprelude/Makefile?rev=1.63;content-type=text%2Fplain

libprelude has an "--enable-easy-bindings" configure flag that's essential to using it's API.

should be a simple fix to add this to ports. It might add a new "swig" dep to the make though.

similar to:

http://bugs.gentoo.org/show_bug.cgi?id=286970
